duoYuYan: Multi language demo, the framework is not configured with multiple languages by default. If necessary, simply introduce the useChangeLang() method in {'@'}/books/useVuei18n to achieve language switching, with the input parameter being the language code, such as zh. The language switching list data can be obtained using the useLangList() method. Please refer to this demo code for details.
